content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom C:7 (carbon with index 7). Let me analyze the connections:

Atom C:7 is connected to:
- C:6 (carbon with index 6) - yellow bond
- C:8 (carbon with index 8) - yellow bond  
- O:14 (oxygen with index 14) - red/yellow bond

These are the three atoms covalently bonded to C:7.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file names in the working directory, I can see "geomconf_2977.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 2977.

So the neighbor atoms of atom 7 (C) are:
- Atom index 6, element C
- Atom index 8, element C  
- Atom index 14, element O

Geomconf_index: 2977

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
